notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins plunked
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins hit by pitch. Steven Kwan to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Brayan Rocchio scores. Steven Kwan scores.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan grounds into a double play, third baseman Brett Harris to shortstop Darell Hernaiz to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Austin Hedges scores. Brayan Rocchio out at 2nd. Steven Kwan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Brent Rooker out at 2nd. Carlos Cortes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas grounds out, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
